hero.headline: 44 Years of Pools Done Right the First Time
hero.subheadline: Your pool deserves the care of a family that has dedicated over four decades to getting it perfect. Living Water Pool Service handles every detail so you can skip the chemicals and go straight to swimming.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From a Team<br class="hidden md:block"> That Knows Every System
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to advanced salt water systems, our 22-person team brings 44 years of hands-on expertise to every backyard in the San Gabriel Valley.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Thorough weekly cleaning including skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and precise chemical balancing. Your pool stays sparkling and swim-ready every single day.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs & Upgrades
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems. We also install energy-saving variable-speed pumps and modern equipment.

cards.title: Green to Clean Recovery
cards.description: Algae-filled pool? We restore even the most neglected pools to crystal-clear condition using proven techniques. Fast turnaround, guaranteed results.

cards.title: Salt Water System Expertise
cards.description: Specialized installation, maintenance, and troubleshooting for salt water chlorination systems. Optimal salt cell performance and perfectly balanced water chemistry.

cards.title: Acid Wash & Resurfacing
cards.description: Professional acid washing removes stubborn stains, mineral deposits, and discoloration. We restore your pool surface to its original clean, bright appearance.

cards.title: Automation & Controls
cards.description: Installation and programming of pool automation systems for convenient control of pumps, lighting, heating, and water features from your phone or panel.

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we will send a technician for a thorough on-site evaluation. You will receive an honest quote within 24 hours — zero pressure, zero obligation.

steps.title: We Take It From Here
steps.description: Our licensed, experienced technicians arrive on schedule every week. Cleaning, chemistry, equipment checks, and seasonal adjustments — all handled by a team with 44 years of expertise.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard Again
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, safe, and ready to swim. If anything is ever less than perfect, we come back and make it right — that is the Living Water promise.

about.label: Why La Canada Flintridge Trusts Us
about.headline: A Family Business Built on Four Decades of Trust
about.description: Founded in 1981 by the Brown family, Living Water Pool Service has grown from a one-man operation to a 22-person team serving the Foothill communities. President Caleb Brown personally oversees every aspect of our service. Our clients stay with us for 15+ years because we treat every pool like it is our own — and we have the 5-star reputation to prove it.

features.title: 44 Years of Local Expertise
features.description: Since 1981, we have built deep knowledge of the unique pool care needs in the San Gabriel Valley and Foothill communities.

features.title: A+ BBB & AAA BCA Rated
features.description: Our accreditations from the Better Business Bureau and Business Consumer Alliance reflect our commitment to honest, quality service.

features.title: 15+ Year Client Relationships
features.description: Our longest clients have trusted us for over fifteen years. We earn your loyalty every single visit, no contracts required.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Flexible plans with no long-term contracts — upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will return to make it right at no additional charge. We have built our reputation over 44 years by standing behind every job. Your pool will meet our standards — or we keep working until it does.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For urgent situations like a green pool, we offer priority same-day or next-day response. Call us at 818-790-2067 and we will work with your timing.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. After each visit you receive a service summary so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Living Water Pool Service holds an active California Contractors State License (#1024755). Our team is fully insured, experienced, and many have been with us for over a decade.

faqs.question: Do you require long-term contracts?
faqs.answer: Never. We believe in earning your business every visit. No contracts, no cancellation fees, no commitments. Our 44-year track record and 288 five-star reviews speak for themselves.

faqs.question: Can you handle salt water pool systems?
faqs.answer: Salt water systems are one of our specialties. We install, maintain, and troubleshoot all major salt chlorination systems. Our technicians are trained to ensure optimal salt cell performance and balanced water chemistry.

testimonials.name: Maria C.
testimonials.text: We have been using Living Water Pool Service for 15 years now and they have done a great job taking care of our pool. Our service man Peter always shows up when scheduled and takes care of any issues in a prompt manner.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Homeowner
testimonials.text: They are very responsive and have done good quality work. They are a little pricey but you get what you pay for and we have not been disappointed. Worth every penny for the peace of mind.

testimonials.name: Long-time Client
testimonials.text: Caleb, the co-owner of the business, has made himself completely familiar with our pool and is always attentive, helpful and knowledgeable, and gets my requests done immediately.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Practically Runs Itself?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation pool evaluation from a family business with 44 years of proven results. No contracts, no pressure — just honest expertise.

footer.description: Family-owned pool service proudly serving La Canada Flintridge and the Foothill communities since 1981.
